name: MCPTool
description: An MCP tool definition exposed by an MCP server, discoverable by AI agent clients.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the tool does.
description.example: Read the contents of a file at the specified path.

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema defining the tool's input parameters.

annotations.description: Optional metadata annotations for the tool.

readOnly.description: If true, the tool only reads data and does not modify state.

destructive.description: If true, the tool may cause irreversible side effects.
